name: Indian Fruit Chaat
tagline: Mixed fresh fruit with chaat masala and lemon — vitamin C, fiber, electrolytes

hero.alt: Cubed mixed fruits with pomegranate, papaya, banana, and orange tossed with chaat masala
hero.caption: fruit chaat — masala-tossed, lemon-bright

steps.title: Wash and dice
steps.detail: Wash all fruit. Dice apple, papaya, guava into 1cm cubes. Slice banana into rounds. Segment the orange.
steps.tip: Cut everything to similar size — every spoonful is a balanced bite.

steps.title: Toss with masala
steps.detail: Combine all fruit in a bowl. Sprinkle chaat masala and black salt. Squeeze lemon juice. Toss gently — don't crush the fruit.
steps.tip: Use a wooden spoon, not metal — keeps the colour and texture.

steps.title: Garnish and serve
steps.detail: Top with pomegranate seeds and mint leaves. Eat fresh — fruit chaat doesn't keep well past 30 minutes.
steps.tip: For an evening snack, add roasted cumin powder for extra digestive aid.

healthFacts: Mixed fruit covers vitamin C, A, K, B6, and folate in a single bowl.
Soluble + insoluble fiber from skins keeps glucose curves gentle.
Pomegranate adds polyphenols (punicalagins) that support cardiovascular health.
Hydrating and low calorie — perfect snack between meals.
